name: @splitstupid/hooks
description: Isomorphic page logic — React hooks shared by the web app (root) and the RN app (mobile/). Wraps @splitstupid/core's data + settlement with each page's stateful behaviour (fetch, derive, actions, permission predicates) so both clients run the SAME logic and only differ in rendering. No DOM, no react-dom, no react-native — just React itself, which is renderer-agnostic.
